projects.name: Metallics Arts
projects.description: Mistborn magic systems fully implemented in Minecraft. Allomancy, Feruchemy and Hemalurgy as real gameplay mechanics inspired by Brandon Sanderson's books.

projects.name: Stuff Ain't Cheap
projects.description: Nerf and modify the trades of the villagers, so that their best trades are not easily farmable.

projects.name: SteelCode News
projects.description: newsletter published randomly which deals with completely random topics always related to programming

projects.name: CityStats
projects.description: A simple mod for Cities Skylines 2. Show some stats in real time.

projects.name: PICO-8 Collection Games
projects.description: Collection of retro games created with PICO-8, the fantasy console that simulates the technical limitations of the 80s.

projects.name: Open Requests
projects.description: Need a mod ported or updated? We support open source. Drop by the Discord and we'll talk — no strings attached.
